steps.title: Compare the two outputs
steps.content: The function is linear, and both given inputs have the same output: $f(0)=9$ and $f(3)=9$. A linear function through those two points has slope $0$.

steps.title: Write the constant function
steps.content:
A slope of $0$ means the output stays at $9$ for every $x$, so the function is
$$f(x)=9$$
The answer is C.
